channel.title: Discrete Event Simulation on Jaehyeon Kim

item.title: Building a Real-Time Industrial Digital Twin with Apache Flink and Online Machine Learning
item.description: Overview Imagine using a rolling pin to flatten out a thick piece of dough. A Hot Strip Mill does the exact same thing, but with glowing red-hot steel slabs (often heated over 1000°C) and massive mechanical rollers. The steel is passed through a series of these rollers, crushing it down from a thick block into a long, thin sheet. Calculating the exact Rolling Force required to crush the steel is critical.
